rules.rule_text:
rule SynFlooder
{
	meta:
		reference = "https://cdn2.hubspot.net/hubfs/270968/assets/Cleaver/Cylance_Operation_Cleaver_Report.pdf"

	strings:
		$s1 = "Unable to resolve [ %s ]. ErrorCode %d"
		$s2 = "your target's IP is : %s"
		$s3 = "Raw TCP Socket Created successfully."

	condition:
		all of them
}
